vertices.label: Dubai Municipality Food Control
vertices.summary: This document describes a specific initiative by the Dubai Municipality, making it a distinct topic that doesn't fit within any existing categories at the 'Universe' level. Creating a new top-level topic will allow for further organization of related documents in the future.
